message:
docs: De-slopify README, remove AI-speak artifacts

- Remove unnecessary "intelligently" qualifier
- Remove hyperbolic "instantly"
- Remove vague "naturally" phrasing

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
